title: Simple AntiCrash
body:
### 🛡️ Simple AntiCrash – Block Dangerous WorldEdit Commands
AntiCalcCrash is a lightweight, no-nonsense plugin that protects your Minecraft server from common WorldEdit command exploits such as //calc, //solve, and //evaluate.

### ✨ Features

🚫 Blocks high-risk commands: //calc, //solve, //evaluate

🔧 Fully customizable block message via config.yml

⚙️ No dependencies — works out of the box with Spigot, Paper, and forks

📝 Auto-generates config on first run

📁 Configuration (config.yml)
yaml
Kopiuj
Edytuj
blocked-message: "&cThis command is blocked on this server."
Supports Minecraft color codes using & (e.g., &c, &a, &6).

### 📦 Installation

Drop the plugin JAR into your plugins/ folder

Start your server

Optionally configure config.yml to your liking

Done!

### 🧠 Why Use This?

WorldEdit commands like //calc can be abused to crash or freeze servers with large or malicious expressions. This plugin cancels them instantly and warns the player, keeping your server safe.

### ✅ Compatibility

Supported: Minecraft 1.8–1.20+

Tested on: Paper, Spigot, Bukkit
